mapper.sql: SELECT n.*, f.name AS folder_name FROM note n LEFT JOIN note_folder f ON n.folder_id = f.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO note (user_id, folder_id, title, summary, content, is_shared) VALUES (#{userId}, #{folderId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{shared})
mapper.update: UPDATE note SET folder_id = #{folderId}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} AND ( n.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(n.summary, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR n.content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM note_tag_rel r INNER JOIN note_tag t ON r.tag_id = t.id WHERE r.note_id = n.id AND t.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM note_folder f2 WHERE f2.id = n.folder_id AND f2.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ) ORDER BY similarity(n.title, #{keyword}) DESC, n.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
